# Aram Zakzuk, MD — Healthcare & Clinical AI Consultant

## Context
Aram Zakzuk is a medical doctor (MD, Universidad del Rosario) based in Madrid, Spain, working as a Healthcare & Clinical AI Consultant. He advises healthcare organizations, consulting firms (Crowe, Deloitte, Accenture, Minsait) and HealthTech / MedTech / Life Sciences companies on Clinical AI evaluation, EU regulatory strategy and clinical adoption of digital health solutions. He is not a software developer nor a data scientist — his technical capacity is the credential that underpins his consulting judgment, not the service itself.

## Profile
- **Medical practice**: 6 years of continuous clinical practice at Méderi (Colombia, 2018–2024) in Internal Medicine, Emergency Medicine and Primary Care.
- **Master in AI applied to Healthcare**: Centro Europeo de Másters y Posgrados (CEMP), 2025–2026.
- **Master in Digital Health / eHealth**: Universidad Europea (Madrid), 2025–2026.
- **AI in Healthcare Specialization**: Stanford University (credential ID JPA2O5IFFDNP).

## What he offers
1. **Clinical AI evaluation and adoption strategy** — auditing AI solutions, clinical fit analysis and adoption roadmap for real hospital environments.
2. **EU regulatory advisory (EU AI Act, MDR, SaMD)** — classification under Regulation 2024/1689, conformity analysis and compliance roadmap for HealthTech and MedTech projects.
3. **Clinical viability of CDSS, data and interoperability** — clinical analysis of Clinical Decision Support Systems, Healthcare Data Analytics and healthcare interoperability (HL7 FHIR, SNOMED-CT, EHDS).
4. **Clinical–technical translation in digital transformation** — bridge between medical judgment, engineering teams and public procurement in healthcare digital transformation projects.

## Projects that ground his consulting judgment
These are personal projects used to validate his technical depth as a consultant — not products nor services offered.
1. **Diabetes risk CDSS (Master thesis)** — Random Forest on CDC BRFSS dataset (253,680 records), AUC-ROC 0.942, XAI/SHAP explainability, RGPD + EU AI Act + EHDS compliance by design. Live demo: https://huggingface.co/spaces/aram1585/diabetes-brfss-cdss
2. **ClinAI Classifier** — open-source tool that classifies healthcare AI systems under EU AI Act (Regulation 2024/1689). Two-stage pipeline (Claude Sonnet 4.5 agent + static rule engine), returns risk level, Annex III categories, Article 5 flags, legal basis and SaMD flag. Live demo: https://huggingface.co/spaces/aram1585/clinai-classifier · Code: https://github.com/aramzakzuk/clinai-classifier
3. **Hospital bed occupancy prediction** — demand model with estimated 30–40% variance reduction over naive baseline, using clinical and operational variables.

## Sectors
HealthTech · MedTech · Life Sciences · Digital Health · Industria Farmacéutica · Medical Device · Hospitals · Health insurance · Public administration · CCAA · Ministerio de Sanidad

## Regulatory and interoperability frameworks
EU AI Act (Regulation 2024/1689) · MDR · SaMD · ISO 13485 · RGPD · EHDS · HL7 FHIR R4 · SNOMED-CT · LOINC · CE marking
